compiled_state.title: Update cross-references from MCP guide to CLI guide in all skills
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Update all skill files and docs that reference PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md to point to PLAYWRIGHT-CLI-GUIDE.md instead.

Files to check (from grep): INSTALL.md, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md, playwright-debug/SKILL.md, validate-work prompts, debug-everything prompts.

## File Impact
- Multiple skill/doc files (EDIT — cross-reference updates only)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No remaining references to PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE.md
  Verify: ! grep -r "PLAYWRIGHT-MCP-GUIDE" plugins/dso/ --include="*.md"
- [ ] CLI guide referenced where MCP guide was
  Verify: grep -r "PLAYWRIGHT-CLI-GUIDE" plugins/dso/ --include="*.md" | head -1
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: Fixed: All cross-references updated from MCP to CLI guide
comments.author: Test
